extensionDescription.message: Skip cookie consent banners on almost every site you visit. Open-source, no telemetry.

reportSkippedTitle.description: Tells the user it cannot report a whitelisted domain.

reportSkippedMessage.message: You have disabled the extension on this website. Please enable it and check if you see the cookie warning before reporting.
reportSkippedMessage.description: Tells the user it cannot report a whitelisted domain.

optionsWhitelist.message: List of all whitelisted websites, one website per line:

optionStatusIndicators.description: Option text for enabling the status indicator

optionDebug.description: Option text for enabling debug logging in the background console.

optionSync.description: Option text for enabling browser-sync of settings.

optionSyncHint.message: Requires Firefox Sync or Chrome Sync to be signed in on every device you want to share with. Without an account, settings stay on this device only.
optionSyncHint.description: Helper text below the sync settings checkbox.

optionLanguage.description: Label for the language selector in the options page.

optionLanguageAuto.description: Language option: match the browser's UI language, fall back to English.

popupSupport.description: Title/aria-label for the heart icon in the popup header that links to the GitHub Sponsors page.

popupPauseOnce.description: Popup button: temporarily pause Crumble on this site and reload, so the user can interact with the site's own consent banner. Auto-expires.

popupPauseOnceHint.message: Pauses Crumble on this site for 90 seconds and reloads the page, so you can answer the site's consent banner yourself. Useful when a site only works after accepting.

supportHeading.description: Section heading for the support/donate card on the options page.

supportLead.message: If Crumble saves you from clicking through cookie banners, consider sponsoring the project. Sponsorship keeps the project independent and the rules current.
supportLead.description: Helper text below the support heading on the options page.

supportButton.description: Button text linking to the GitHub Sponsors page.

optionLanguageHint.message: Choose the language used by the popup and this options page. The extension defaults to English; pick a different language at any time.
optionLanguageHint.description: Helper text below the language selector.

commandToggleWhitelist.message: Toggle the extension on the current site
commandToggleWhitelist.description: Description shown in the browser's keyboard-shortcut settings for the toggle command.

optionThemeAuto.description: Theme option: follow the operating system preference.

optionsGeneralSection.description: Section heading for the general settings card.

optionsWhitelistSection.description: Section heading for the whitelist card.

optionsWhitelistHint.message: Each line is one domain. Subdomains and www-prefixes are normalised on save.
optionsWhitelistHint.description: Helper text below the whitelist textarea.

optionsBackupHint.message: Download your whitelist and settings as a JSON file, or restore from a previous backup.
optionsBackupHint.description: Helper text below the backup heading.

optionsBackupSection.description: Section heading for the backup/export feature.

optionsExport.description: Button text to export settings as JSON file.

optionsImport.description: Button text to import settings from JSON file.

optionsImportSuccess.description: Status text after a successful import.

optionsImportError.description: Status text after a failed import.

optionsSaved.description: Status text after settings were saved.
